title: The Potential Impact of GHG Reductions on Air Pollution in India

summary.about: Whether cutting greenhouse gases under India’s Paris commitments also reduces harmful local air pollution.
summary.audience: Indian climate, energy, health and air-quality policymakers.
summary.method: Uses economy-wide modeling of Paris-aligned GHG reductions and air-pollution changes across sectors.
summary.insights: Climate and clean-air goals can reinforce or conflict with each other, so policy should target both rather than assume automatic co-benefits.
